_comment: Slice-groove listening aid: drum material. Record 1-9s, STEP from 10s. MOTION on a sampler deck is driven by MOD (set_depth), not the LANE_MOTION base (see part.cpp sampler MOTION note) -- opens 14/22/30, ordered slice-walk first, disordered chop-kit last. DENS max from 26s lets the offs roll. Action note: the plan draft named 'set_sampler_overlap', which is not in scenario.cpp's action table -- the nearest existing action is 'sampler_overlap' (inst.sampler_overlap(part, value)), used below.
